title: Disease-genetics overlay packet

source.name: Open Targets Platform GraphQL API
source.source_rows: campaign genes with selected immune or hematologic target-disease associations

classes.meaning: Selected external context includes an immune or hematologic disease row with positive genetic association score.
Selected external context includes immune or hematologic disease context, but not positive genetic association support.
Open Targets has target-disease associations, but none selected by this bounded immune or hematologic filter.

rows.approved_name: protein geranylgeranyltransferase type I subunit beta
rows.why_it_matters: Open Targets attaches psoriasis context to PGGT1B, which helps frame follow-up assays without changing the Prospect status.
rows.why_it_does_not_accept_state: External target-disease association is context only. Prospect accepted state still requires the frozen perturbation verifier and human signing path.

rows.why_it_matters: The campaign row remains a perturbation-first candidate with no selected immune or hematologic external context in this bounded Open Targets extract.

limitations: This overlay attaches external disease context to campaign rows. It is not a therapeutic claim, clinical result, or accepted biological state.
